title: hordeum bulbosum
intro: Hordeum bulbosum, also known as false spelt or wild spelt, is a type of wild grass belonging to the wheat family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hordeum bulbosum include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Hordeum bulbosum can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water.
